title: Senior Plant Manager at Birla Tyres

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Birla Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Birla Tyres in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Birla Tyres:
Birla Tyres is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres!
